sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73059" key="o)ligopra/gmwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλῐγο-πράγμων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <sense id="n73059.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">averse to business, retiring,</tr_> opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πολυπράγμων,</foreign> ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
